posts.author: Hanging_Chad
posts.title: photo of Malcolm X holding an M1 Carbine

quotedTweet.content:
Photo of Malcolm X holding an M1 Carbine in March 1964 after receiving numerous death threats from the Nation of Islam.

The threats came after he exposed Elijah Muhammad, the longtime leader of the movement, for having children with underage girls.

posts.title: Belgium Euthanizes Another 4,500 Citizens as ‘Assisted Suicide’ Death Toll Surges. Nearly a quarter of those euthanized were not expected to die in the near term from natural causes.
